script:
set +e
echo '=== CLAUDE constants in per-user responders ==='
grep -H '^CLAUDE\s*=' /home/azureuser/*-responder.py 2>/dev/null
echo '=== model in per-user responders ==='
grep -H -E '"--model",\s*"claude' /home/azureuser/*-responder.py 2>/dev/null
echo '=== aixa last 8 errors any ==='
tail -8 /home/azureuser/.aixa-bot/responder-errors.log 2>/dev/null
echo '=== alejandro last 8 errors ==='
tail -8 /home/azureuser/.alejandro-bot/responder-errors.log 2>/dev/null
echo '=== ashley last 8 errors ==='
tail -8 /home/azureuser/.ashley-bot/responder-errors.log 2>/dev/null
echo '=== cameron last 8 errors ==='
tail -8 /home/azureuser/.cameron-bot/responder-errors.log 2>/dev/null
echo '=== jesus-reyes last 8 errors ==='
tail -8 /home/azureuser/.jesus-reyes-bot/responder-errors.log 2>/dev/null
echo '=== shared claude credential file ==='
ls -la /home/azureuser/.claude/ 2>/dev/null
echo '=== per-bot .claude dirs (if any) ==='
ls -ld /home/azureuser/.*-bot/.claude 2>/dev/null
echo '===END==='
